name: bunlight-mcp
description: Bunlight MCP server: 8 tools (scrape, detect, AI extract, DOM query, links, screenshot, cookies, pool).

tools.name: bunlight_scrape
tools.description: Open a URL with a Bunlight profile and return title, content, and metrics.

tools.name: bunlight_detect
tools.description: Detect frameworks, CMS, and WAF on a URL, suggest the cheapest profile.

tools.name: bunlight_extract_cookies
tools.description: Load a cookie jar from cookies/private/<domain>.json.

tools.name: bunlight_ai_extract
tools.description: Extract structured data using Anthropic Claude via natural language.

tools.name: bunlight_extract_links
tools.description: Extract all links from a page with hostname/domain filtering.

tools.name: bunlight_screenshot
tools.description: Take a PNG screenshot (requires fast/stealth/max profile).

tools.name: bunlight_dom_query
tools.description: Run a CSS selector and return text content and attributes.
